channel.title: Boletim diário de segurança e TI
channel.description: Feed curado com criticidade, categoria, CVEs e resumo diário.

item.title: Resumo do dia | 11/03/2026 | Phishing e Identidade
item.description:
Resumo do dia Data: 11/03/2026 13:55 (BRT) Tipo de boletim: Phishing e Identidade
Totais: - Itens novos: 12 - Criticidade Alta: 11 - Criticidade Média: 1 - Criticidade Baixa: 0 - Patches/CVEs: 10 - Ameaças: 0 - Breaches/Vazamentos: 1 - Identidade/Phishing: 1 - Cloud/DevSecOps: 0
Destaques prioritários: 1. [Alta] CISA Flags SolarWinds, Ivanti, and Workspace One Vulnerabilities as Actively Exploited (The Hacker News) 2. [Alta] Critical n8n Flaws Allow Remote Code Execution and Exposure of Stored Credentials (The Hacker News) 3. [Alta] Microsoft Patches 84 Flaws in March Patch Tuesday, Including Two Public Zero-Days (The Hacker News)
Patches e CVEs em destaque: 1. [Alta] CISA Flags SolarWinds, Ivanti, and Workspace One Vulnerabilities as Actively Exploited | CVE-2021-22054 2. [Alta] Critical n8n Flaws Allow Remote Code Execution and Exposure of Stored Credentials | CVE-2026-27577, CVE-2026-27493 3. [Alta] Microsoft Patches 84 Flaws in March Patch Tuesday, Including Two Public Zero-Days | sem CVE explícito
Ameaças e campanhas: Nenhuma ameaça em destaque.

item.title: [Alta] [PATCHES] CISA Flags SolarWinds, Ivanti, and Workspace One Vulnerabilities as Actively Exploited
item.description:
Criticidade: Alta Categoria: patches Fonte: The Hacker News Tecnologia/Fabricante: VMware CVEs: CVE-2021-22054 Publicado em: 10/03/2026 03:17
Resumo: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Monday added three security flaws to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, based on evidence of active exploitation. The vulnerability list is as follows - CVE-2021-22054 (CVSS score: 7.5) - A server-side request forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Omnissa Workspace One UEM (formerly VMware Workspace One UEM) that
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/cisa-flags-solarwinds-ivanti-and.html

item.title: [Alta] [PATCHES] Critical n8n Flaws Allow Remote Code Execution and Exposure of Stored Credentials
item.description:
Criticidade: Alta Categoria: patches Fonte: The Hacker News Tecnologia/Fabricante: AWS CVEs: CVE-2026-27577, CVE-2026-27493 Publicado em: 11/03/2026 11:51
Resumo: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of two now-patched security flaws in the n8n workflow automation platform, including two critical bugs that could result in arbitrary command execution. The vulnerabilities are listed below - CVE-2026-27577 (CVSS score: 9.4) - Expression sandbox escape leading to remote code execution (RCE) CVE-2026-27493 (CVSS score: 9.5) - Unauthenticated
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/critical-n8n-flaws-allow-remote-code.html

item.title: [Alta] [PATCHES] Microsoft Patches 84 Flaws in March Patch Tuesday, Including Two Public Zero-Days
item.description:
Criticidade: Alta Categoria: patches Fonte: The Hacker News Tecnologia/Fabricante: Microsoft CVEs: Nenhum identificado Publicado em: 11/03/2026 06:15
Resumo: Microsoft on Tuesday released patches for a set of 84 new security vulnerabilities affecting various software components, including two that have been listed as publicly known. Of these, eight are rated Critical, and 76 are rated Important in severity. Forty-six of the patched vulnerabilities relate to privilege escalation, followed by 18 remote code execution, 10 information disclosure, four
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/microsoft-patches-84-flaws-in-march.html

item.title: [Alta] [PATCHES] The Zero-Day Scramble is Avoidable: A Guide to Attack Surface Reduction
item.description:
Criticidade: Alta Categoria: patches Fonte: The Hacker News Tecnologia/Fabricante: N/D CVEs: Nenhum identificado Publicado em: 10/03/2026 08:00
Resumo: You can't control when the next critical vulnerability drops. You can control how much of your environment is exposed when it does. The problem is that most teams have more internet-facing exposure than they realise. Intruder's Head of Security digs into why this happens and how teams can manage it deliberately. Time-to-exploit is shrinking The larger and less controlled your attack surface is,
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/the-zero-day-scramble-is-avoidable.html

item.title: [Alta] [PATCHES] Dozens of Vendors Patch Security Flaws Across Enterprise Software and Network Devices
item.description:
Criticidade: Alta Categoria: patches Fonte: The Hacker News Tecnologia/Fabricante: AWS CVEs: CVE-2019-17571, CVE-2026-27685 Publicado em: 11/03/2026 09:26
Resumo: SAP has released security updates to address two critical security flaws that could be exploited to achieve arbitrary code execution on affected systems. The vulnerabilities in question listed below - CVE-2019-17571 (CVSS score: 9.8) - A code injection vulnerability in SAP Quotation Management Insurance application (FS-QUO) CVE-2026-27685 (CVSS score: 9.1) - An insecure deserialization
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/dozens-of-vendors-patch-security-flaws.html

item.title: [Alta] [PATCHES] CISA: Recently patched Ivanti EPM flaw now actively exploited
item.description:
Criticidade: Alta Categoria: patches Fonte: BleepingComputer Tecnologia/Fabricante: Ivanti CVEs: Nenhum identificado Publicado em: 10/03/2026 08:36
Resumo: CISA flagged a high-severity Ivanti Endpoint Manager (EPM) vulnerability as actively exploited in attacks and ordered U.S. federal agencies to patch systems within three weeks. [...]
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-recently-patched-ivanti-epm-flaw-now-actively-exploited/

item.title: [Alta] [PATCHES] Microsoft releases Windows 10 KB5078885 extended security update
item.description:
Criticidade: Alta Categoria: patches Fonte: BleepingComputer Tecnologia/Fabricante: Microsoft CVEs: Nenhum identificado Publicado em: 10/03/2026 15:23
Resumo: Microsoft has released the Windows 10 KB5078885 extended security update to fix the March 2026 Patch Tuesday vulnerabilities, including 2 zero-days and an issue that prevent some devices from shutting down. [...]
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/microsoft-releases-windows-10-kb5078885-extended-security-update/

item.title: [Alta] [BREACH] UNC6426 Exploits nx npm Supply-Chain Attack to Gain AWS Admin Access in 72 Hours
item.description:
Criticidade: Alta Categoria: breach Fonte: The Hacker News Tecnologia/Fabricante: AWS CVEs: Nenhum identificado Publicado em: 11/03/2026 04:31
Resumo: A threat actor known as UNC6426 leveraged keys stolen following the supply chain compromise of the nx npm package last year to completely breach a victim's cloud environment within a span of 72 hours. The attack started with the theft of a developer's GitHub token, which the threat actor then used to gain unauthorized access to the cloud and steal data. "The threat actor, UNC6426, then used this
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/unc6426-exploits-nx-npm-supply-chain.html

item.title: [Média] [IDENTITY] Microsoft Teams phishing targets employees with A0Backdoor malware
item.description:
Criticidade: Média Categoria: identity Fonte: BleepingComputer Tecnologia/Fabricante: Microsoft CVEs: Nenhum identificado Publicado em: 09/03/2026 19:50
Resumo: Hackers contacted employees at financial and healthcare organizations over Microsoft Teams to trick them into granting remote access through Quick Assist and deploy a new piece of malware called A0Backdoor. [...]
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/microsoft-teams-phishing-targets-employees-with-backdoors/

item.title: [Alta] [PATCHES] Microsoft Patch Tuesday, March 2026 Edition
item.description:
Criticidade: Alta Categoria: patches Fonte: Krebs on Security Tecnologia/Fabricante: Microsoft CVEs: Nenhum identificado Publicado em: 10/03/2026 21:32
Resumo: Microsoft Corp. today pushed security updates to fix at least 77 vulnerabilities in its Windows operating systems and other software. There are no pressing "zero-day" flaws this month (compared to February's five zero-day treat), but as usual some patches may deserve more rapid attention from organizations using Windows. Here are a few highlights from this month's Patch Tuesday.
Link: https://krebsonsecurity.com/2026/03/microsoft-patch-tuesday-march-2026-edition/

item.title: [Alta] [PATCHES] Microsoft March 2026 Patch Tuesday fixes 2 zero-days, 79 flaws
item.description:
Criticidade: Alta Categoria: patches Fonte: BleepingComputer Tecnologia/Fabricante: Microsoft CVEs: Nenhum identificado Publicado em: 10/03/2026 14:49
Resumo: Today is Microsoft's March 2026 Patch Tuesday with security updates for 79 flaws, including 2 publicly disclosed zero-day vulnerabilities. [...]
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/microsoft-march-2026-patch-tuesday-fixes-2-zero-days-79-flaws/

item.title: [Alta] [PATCHES] HPE warns of critical AOS-CX flaw allowing admin password resets
item.description:
Criticidade: Alta Categoria: patches Fonte: BleepingComputer Tecnologia/Fabricante: N/D CVEs: Nenhum identificado Publicado em: 10/03/2026 14:30
Resumo: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) has patched multiple security vulnerabilities in the Aruba Networking AOS-CX operating system, including several authentication and code execution issues. [...]
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hpe-warns-of-critical-aos-cx-flaw-allowing-admin-password-resets/
